title: OpenClaw native Discord slash commands should still return content in multi-account setups

source.license_note: Localized ACBench reproduction derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #54915.

task.summary: Repair Discord command dispatch so native slash commands still return content in multi-account setups.
task.instructions: Investigate why slash commands and inline shortcuts degrade to Done or stop stripping correctly in multi-account Discord deployments, repair the native dispatch path, and preserve the plugin-command behavior for text commands.
task.acceptance_notes: Alternative fixes are allowed as long as native slash commands return content again.

visible_context.issue_text: In a multi-account Discord setup, native slash commands return Done with no content and inline shortcuts stop behaving like commands.
error_logs: InteractionEventListener completes but the slash response contains only Done.
CLI agent path still returns the correct command output
reproduction_steps: Run the unit tests from the repository root.
visible_context.notes: This fixture models the same dispatch-order bug with multi-account Discord framing.

code_fault.description: Native slash commands are routed through the wrong command path and lose their content in multi-account setups.

constraints.notes: This GitHub-derived reproduction is expected to be repaired in code, not by changing tests.

notes: Code-only localized reproduction of openclaw/openclaw issue #54915.
